# RavDevOps Candidate Submission

## Linked issue
Closes #

## 1. Summary
Describe what you changed and what is complete.

## 2. Architecture impact
Explain the request lifecycle changes, if any.

## 3. Retrieval / logic impact
If your change affects retrieval, scheduling, persistence, or API behavior, explain exactly how.

## 4. Testing
What tests did you add or update?

## 5. Docker / execution notes
List any command or environment changes required to run the repo.

## 6. AI usage disclosure (required)
- What AI tool(s) did you use?
- Which files or sections were AI-assisted?
- What did the AI get wrong or incomplete?
- What did you rewrite manually?
- How did you verify the final behavior?

## 7. Tradeoffs
What did you intentionally not do?

## 8. Reviewer notes
Anything specific you want the reviewer to focus on?
